text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. In truth, I've been training during my
downtime as well, in a certain sense.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I've... been doing zazen meditation. While focusing my mind, I calmly reflect upon my journey thus far and clear my head of worldly thoughts one by one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Having fully charged my body and mind, I'm
completely energized. Now, let's begin the next
phase of training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Yaeno Muteki got the ideal amount
of rest!
